## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the future of the partnership between Homebase and fwd.digital, addressing concerns and planning next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homebase wants to reset and reevaluate the engagement with fwd.digital over the next 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [fwd.digital aims to improve content quality, flexibility, and strategic alignment](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Both parties agree to reassess and potentially redefine the partnership scope and investment level](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Content quality and editorial standards are a key focus for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)

## Topics

### Current Partnership Status and Concerns

  - [Homebase is paying \~$9-10k/month but feels unclear about the direction and value](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Nick (Homebase) wants to pause, reassess, and get a "pitch" on how fwd.digital can best help](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Concerns about content quality, AI-generated content, and editorial needs](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [Desire for a better balance between factual and high-value, potentially converting content](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)

### fwd.digital's Capabilities and Successes

  - [Highlighted success with other clients (Reddit, Ramp) and potential for Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Showed example of high-performing article written for Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Demonstrated competitive research capabilities (e.g., 3,700 keyword opportunities for another client)](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Detailed their content creation workflow, including AI generation and human editing processes](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### Content Strategy and Quality Improvements

  - [fwd.digital proposes a content strategy reset and quality improvement plan](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Suggestion to potentially reduce volume to focus on quality](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Offer to add value through customer stories or sales call content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Discussion of editorial standards and the need for human touch in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### Technical Challenges

  - [Issues with site migration affecting data tracking and reporting](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Multiple URL versions (www vs non-www) complicating performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Google Search Console migration difficulties](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

### Next Steps and Proposal

  - [30-day reset period to reassess and improve the partnership](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Plan for a 1-2 hour deep dive session with Carrie, Marcel, and Jimmy](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [fwd.digital to present a new backlog of proposed initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Both parties to come prepared with ideas and scope recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Carrie to provide examples of ideal content to fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule deep dive session with Carrie, Marcel, and Jimmy](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [fwd.digital to prepare new backlog of proposed initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Homebase (Carrie) to provide examples of ideal content](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Both parties to develop ideas and scope recommendations for the reset period](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Reassess partnership and make a decision within 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [fwd.digital to improve reporting and data analysis, addressing technical challenges](https://fathom.video/share/pNUGJsvzzX6sL3QUyjb8gRvXpiwDJxLG?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
